title: This farmer wanted to quit the cocaine industry - he couldn't
summary: Colombian farmers seeking to exit coca cultivation face significant obstacles due to insufficient government support for crop alternatives. The lack of assistance leaves many growers caught in cocaine production despite their desire to transition to legal crops.
content: Colombians who grow cocaine's raw material bemoan a lack of support to help them switch crops.

zh.title: 这名农民想退出可卡因产业——他做不到
zh.summary: 哥伦比亚寻求放弃古柯种植的农民因政府对作物替代品支持不足而面临重大障碍。由于缺乏援助，许多种植户被困在可卡因生产中，尽管他们渴望转向合法作物。

title: Are you a parent missing out on £27 a week? Here's how to check
summary: Thousands of new parents in the UK are missing out on up to £27 weekly in child benefits due to late or failed claims, according to HMRC. The tax authority warns that many are unaware of eligibility deadlines to receive full retroactive payments.
content: Thousands of new parents fail to claim child benefit until it is too late to receive some of the money, HMRC says.

zh.title: 你是否作为家长错过了每周27英镑的福利？检查方法如下
zh.summary: 英国数千名新手父母由于申请迟到或失败，正在错过每周最高27英镑的儿童福利。英国税务海关总署警告许多人不知道领取全额追溯支付的资格截止期限。

title: My fitness tracker knew I was pregnant before I did
summary: Hundreds of women, including one named Ravika, are discovering early pregnancy signs through data tracked by fitness wearables before confirming it through traditional tests. The devices detect subtle physiological changes that can indicate early pregnancy.
content: Ravika is one of hundreds of women who are noticing early pregnancy signs through the data on their fitness trackers.

zh.title: 我的健身追踪器比我更早知道我怀孕了
zh.summary: 数百名女性包括一位名叫Ravika的女性正在通过健身可穿戴设备追踪的数据发现早期怀孕迹象，随后才通过传统测试确认。这些设备能检测到可能表明早期怀孕的微妙生理变化。

title: Spain wins the World Cup by beating Argentina 1-0 on Ferran Torres' goal in extra time
summary: Ferran Torres scored the decisive goal in extra time as Spain defeated Argentina 1-0 to win the 2026 World Cup. The goal marked Torres' breakthrough moment at the tournament and restored Spain to the top of international football.
content: Ferran Torres' first goal of this year's World Cup was the goal of his life, and it put Spain back atop the soccer world.

zh.title: 西班牙因费兰·托雷斯的加时赛进球1-0击败阿根廷赢得世界杯
zh.summary: 费兰·托雷斯在加时赛中打进决定性进球，西班牙以1-0击败阿根廷赢得2026年世界杯。这个进球标志着托雷斯在本届赛事中的突破时刻，将西班牙恢复到国际足球的顶端。

title: Vice President JD Vance announces birth of son
summary: Vice President JD Vance announced the birth of his son, Alec Neel Vance, born on Sunday at Walter Reed National Military Medical Center in Maryland.
content: Vance said the baby, Alec Neel Vance, was born on Sunday at Walter Reed National Military Medical Center in Bethesda, Maryland.

zh.title: 副总统JD·范斯宣布其子出生
zh.summary: 副总统JD·范斯宣布他的儿子艾力克·尼尔·范斯出生，于周日在马里兰州沃尔特·里德国家军医中心出生。

title: Justice Department activates untested court for 'alien terrorist' deportations
summary: The Justice Department has activated the Alien Terrorist Removal Court, an untested judicial forum for considering deportation proceedings on national security grounds. Judge James Boasberg had previously suggested the court as the natural venue for such cases.
content: Judge James Boasberg has suggested the Alien Terrorist Removal Court would be the natural forum for considering deportation on national security grounds.

zh.title: 司法部启动未经测试的"外国恐怖分子"驱逐出境法庭
zh.summary: 司法部已启动了外国恐怖分子移除法庭，这是一个未经测试的司法论坛，用于审议国家安全基础上的驱逐出境诉讼。法官詹姆斯·博斯伯格之前曾建议该法庭作为此类案件的自然审议场所。

title: FBI will no longer investigate ICE confrontations, The New York Times reports
summary: The FBI may be scaling back investigations into Immigration and Customs Enforcement confrontations, according to reporting. However, the Department of Justice and Department of Homeland Security have denied any formal policy change.
content: The Department of Justice and the Department of Homeland Security have both denied that any change in oversight has taken place.

zh.title: FBI将不再调查移民及海关执法部门的对抗事件，据《纽约时报》报道
zh.summary: 据报道，FBI可能会缩减对移民及海关执法部门对抗事件的调查。但司法部和国土安全部否认了任何正式的政策变化。

title: Thames Water lenders preparing legal challenge in event of Burnham nationalisation
summary: Thames Water lenders are preparing legal action in response to potential nationalization under Andy Burnham. Creditors are threatening to demand full repayment of billions of pounds in outstanding debt.
content: The BBC understands creditors would would pursue payment in full of the outstanding debts, in the multi-billions of pounds.

zh.title: 泰晤士水务债权人准备应对伯纳姆国有化的法律诉讼
zh.summary: 泰晤士水务债权人正在准备法律诉讼，以应对安迪·伯纳姆潜在的国有化计划。债权人威胁要求全额偿还数十亿英镑的未清债务。

title: Universal and Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' sails to $124.5 million opening
summary: Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' achieved a major domestic opening weekend, earning $124.5 million at the U.S. box office. Strong IMAX performance helped drive the record-breaking result.
content: Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" tallied an estimated $124.5 million at the domestic box office, with IMAX screenings fueling a big haul.

zh.title: 环球影业和克里斯托弗·诺兰的《奥德赛》北美首周末票房达1.245亿美元
zh.summary: 克里斯托弗·诺兰的《奥德赛》在北美市场首周末创造了重大成绩，票房达1.245亿美元。强劲的IMAX表现推动了这一破纪录的成果。

title: Is there a deadline to claim the $1,000 ‘Trump account’ contribution for my kid?
summary: The article examines deadlines for claiming a $1,000 government contribution to education-related accounts for children. Some families who don't qualify for the full amount may be eligible for an initial $250 payment.
content: Some children who don’t qualify for the government contribution may be eligible for an initial $250.

zh.title: 为我的孩子申领1,000美元"特朗普账户"捐款有截止期限吗?
zh.summary: 该文章讨论了申领1,000美元政府教育相关账户捐款的截止期限。不符合全额条件的部分家庭可能有资格获得初期250美元的付款。

title: The World Cup winner will earn $51 million under expanded purse
summary: FIFA significantly expanded prize money for the 2026 World Cup, with the winning team set to earn $51 million. Total prize distributions across all 48 participating teams reach a record $871 million.
content: FIFA expanded the payout for the 2026 World Cup, setting a record with a combined $871 million paid to the 48 participating teams.

zh.title: 在扩大奖金池的情况下,世界杯冠军将获得5,100万美元
zh.summary: 国际足联大幅增加了2026年世界杯的奖金,冠军队伍将获得5,100万美元。全部48支参赛队伍的总奖金分配创纪录地达到8.71亿美元。

title: The market for psychedelic drugs to treat mental health conditions gets a big buy signal
summary: Eli Lilly's acquisition of psychedelic drug maker AtaiBeckley signals major pharmaceutical industry interest in psychedelic treatments for mental health conditions. The deal reflects expanding mainstream acceptance of this emerging therapeutic approach.
content: Eli Lilly's acquisition of psychedelic drug maker AtaiBeckley extends Big Pharma's embrace of a stigmatized class of medications for treating mental health.

zh.title: 用于治疗心理健康问题的迷幻药物市场获得强劲买入信号
zh.summary: 礼来公司收购迷幻药物制造商AtaiBeckley,表明制药行业对迷幻疗法治疗心理健康问题的重大关注。这笔交易反映了这一新兴治疗方法获得越来越多主流接受。

title: Can former employers withhold money from your 401(k) when you’re laid off?
summary: The article explores whether employers can withhold 401(k) funds during layoffs and outlines two methods for transferring retirement savings when leaving a job. One approach carries significant financial penalties worth understanding.
content: There are two main ways to move money from your workplace retirement plan when you leave your job. One can cost you.

zh.title: 被裁员时前雇主能否扣留你的401(k)养老金?
zh.summary: 本文探讨了雇主是否可以在裁员期间扣留401(k)资金,并概述了离职时转移退休储蓄的两种方法。其中一种方法可能导致重大财务处罚,需要充分了解。

title: 26-year-old quit her corporate job to become a seamstress at Yellowstone National Park for $19.25/hour
summary: Zoe De La Paz transitioned from her corporate engineering career to pursue sewing full-time as a seamstress at Yellowstone National Park, earning $19.25 per hour. Her career change reflects a deliberate choice to prioritize passion over higher-paying corporate employment.
content: Zoe De La Paz made her own luck to transition from her corporate engineering job to pursue sewing full-time.

zh.title: 26岁女性辞去公司工作，在黄石国家公园做裁缝，时薪$19.25/小时
zh.summary: 佐伊·德拉·帕斯从她的公司工程职业转变，全职从事黄石国家公园的裁缝工作，每小时赚取19.25美元。她的职业转变反映了一个有意的选择，优先考虑热情而不是薪资更高的公司工作。

title: AI may make you 'boring' at work, Columbia Business School professor says: How it can hurt your career
summary: Columbia Business School professor Sandra Matz warns that overreliance on AI in the workplace could diminish career prospects by reducing skill development. Excessive AI use may lead workers to gradually fall behind and become complacent.
content: Using AI at work in the wrong ways could lead to "gradually falling behind and becoming complacent," said Sandra Matz, a professor at Columbia Business School.

zh.title: 哥伦比亚商学院教授称AI可能让你在工作中变得"无趣":它如何伤害你的职业生涯
zh.summary: 哥伦比亚商学院教授桑德拉·玛茨警告,在工作中过度依赖AI可能会通过减少技能发展而损害职业前景。过度使用AI可能导致员工逐渐落后并变得自满。

title: Stop asking 'How was work today?' Successful, mentally strong couples ask these 7 questions instead
summary: Author Amy Morin suggests that the standard 'How was work today?' question traps couples in unproductive communication patterns. She offers seven alternative questions designed to strengthen emotional intimacy and connection.
content: This question can get you "stuck in a communication rut," says Amy Morin, author of "13 Things Mentally Strong Couples Don't Do." Here's what to ask instead.

zh.title: 停止问"你今天工作怎么样?"成功的、心理强大的夫妇改问这7个问题
zh.summary: 作者艾米·莫林建议,标准的"你今天工作怎么样?"问题会让夫妇陷入低效的沟通模式。她提出了七个旨在加强情感亲密和联系的替代问题。

title: Earnings playbook: Alphabet and Tesla are among the big companies set to report this week
summary: Major technology companies including Alphabet and Tesla are scheduled to report quarterly earnings this week. The reports mark an intensification of earnings season with results from two of the market's largest corporations.
content: The earnings season heats up this week with two megacaps set to release their latest results.

zh.summary: 包括Alphabet和特斯拉在内的主要科技公司将在本周发布季度财报。这些报告标志着财报季的升温，来自市场两家最大公司的业绩即将公布。

title: Anger as water supply misery continues for second day
summary: Residents in Kent, England face a second day of water supply disruptions caused by South East Water. Widespread frustration is growing over the utility company's handling of the ongoing crisis.
content: Residents in Kent describe South East Water as "incompetently useless" as supply issues continue.

zh.title: 供水危机持续：肯特郡居民愤怒度与日俱增
zh.summary: 英国肯特郡的居民面临第二天的供水中断，由东南水务公司造成。居民对该公用事业公司应对这场持续危机的方式越来越感到沮丧。

title: Top Wall Street analysts suggest these 3 dividend stocks for steady income
summary: Wall Street's top analysts, as tracked by TipRanks, have identified three dividend-paying stocks for investors seeking steady income streams. These recommendations reflect professional guidance on income-generating investment opportunities.
content: Here are three dividend-paying stocks that are highlighted by Wall Street's top pros, as tracked by TipRanks.

zh.title: 华尔街顶级分析师推荐这3只分红股票实现稳定收益
zh.summary: 根据TipRanks追踪的华尔街顶级分析师已确定了三只分红股票，供寻求稳定收入流的投资者选择。这些推荐反映了专业人士对创收投资机会的指导意见。

title: Kalshi adds 3 million new users as prediction market capitalizes on the World Cup
summary: The prediction market Kalshi has gained 3 million new users by capitalizing on World Cup interest through targeted advertising and brand partnerships during the tournament. The platform is expanding reach by featuring soccer players in ads and securing high-visibility placements.
content: The prediction market has launched some ads featuring soccer players, as well as formed a partnership to display its brand in more places during the tournament.

zh.title: 卡尔希凭借世界杯预测市场新增300万用户
zh.summary: 预测市场卡尔希通过在世界杯期间进行定向广告和品牌合作，新增了300万用户。该平台通过在广告中展示足球运动员并获得高曝光位置来扩大覆盖范围。

title: Russia pounds Kyiv in major ballistic missile attack
summary: Russia launched a major ballistic missile attack on Kyiv involving 41 missiles of various types, resulting in powerful explosions and widespread destruction across multiple city districts. The attack represents a significant escalation of military operations against the Ukrainian capital.
content: Powerful explosions thundered across the darkened city in an attack that involved 41 missiles of various types and ravaged buildings across several districts.

zh.title: 俄罗斯对基辅展开重大弹道导弹袭击
zh.summary: 俄罗斯对基辅发动了涉及41枚各种类型导弹的重大弹道导弹袭击，造成强大爆炸和城市多个地区的广泛破坏。这次袭击代表了针对乌克兰首都军事行动的重大升级。

title: Samsung reportedly cuts some U.S. jobs, offers relocations ahead of HQ move: Reuters
summary: Samsung has reportedly reduced staff at its U.S. operations across display, phone, and consumer electronics divisions while offering employee relocations as part of a broader headquarters move. The reductions indicate the company's strategic shift in its U.S. footprint.
content: The Korean electronics giant as reportedly reduced staff at its U.S. display, phone and other consumer electronics operations.

zh.title: 据路透社报道，三星裁减部分美国员工，在总部搬迁前提供重新安置方案
zh.summary: 三星据报道在显示屏、手机和消费电子产品部门的美国业务中裁减员工，并作为更广泛总部搬迁计划的一部分提供员工重新安置方案。这些裁减表明该公司正在调整其在美国的战略布局。

title: American Airlines CEO lays out his vision to close a more than $3 billion profit gap
summary: American Airlines' CEO has unveiled a multi-pronged strategy to address a profit gap exceeding $3 billion, including operational reliability improvements, premium seat and lounge investments, and potential aircraft orders from Boeing or Airbus. The plan reflects efforts to enhance profitability and competitiveness.
content: The carrier is working on improving reliability, investing in more premium seats and lounges, and considering Boeing and Airbus for a new wide-body plane order.

zh.title: 美国航空CEO阐述其缩小超30亿美元利润差距的愿景
zh.summary: 美国航空CEO公布了一项多管齐下的战略，旨在解决超过30亿美元的利润差距，包括运营可靠性改进、高级座位和酒廊投资，以及可能向波音或空客订购飞机。该计划反映了公司提高盈利能力和竞争力的努力。

title: Housing costs is the top political issue for young voters, CNBC survey finds
summary: A CNBC All-America Economic Survey reveals that housing costs are the top political priority for voters ages 18 to 34, surpassing concerns about food and healthcare affordability. The finding underscores the centrality of the housing crisis to younger generations' political priorities.
content: The cost of housing is the top priority for voters ages 18 to 34, besting food and healthcare cost concerns, the CNBC All-America Economic Survey found.

zh.title: CNBC调查发现，住房成本是年轻选民最关注的政治议题
zh.summary: CNBC全美经济调查显示，住房成本是18至34岁选民最关注的政治优先事项，超过了对食品和医疗可负担性的担忧。这一发现突显了住房危机对年轻一代政治优先事项的重要性。

title: Can the ‘Magnificent Seven’ save a stock market that might be doomed without them?
summary: Apple, Amazon, Nvidia and other 'Magnificent Seven' stocks are showing renewed momentum that could revitalize the broader stock market, which has been sluggish without their outperformance. The tech giants' resurgence could provide the catalyst needed for wider market gains.
content: Apple, Amazon, Nvidia and peers are quietly coming back to life, and that could easily jolt this sleepy stock market back into gear.

zh.title: "七大巨头"能否拯救可能注定衰落的股市？
zh.summary: 苹果、亚马逊、英伟达等"七大巨头"股票显示出新的动力，可能会重振因缺乏其卓越表现而迟滞的更广泛股市。这些科技巨头的复兴可能会为更广泛的市场收益提供所需的催化剂。

title: U.S. says it targeted Iranian forces after attacks that killed two American service members
summary: The U.S. military conducted strikes against Iran's coastal surveillance and air defense facilities in response to an Iranian attack on Jordan that resulted in two American service members' deaths. Centcom confirmed the retaliatory action against Iranian forces.
content: Centcom says it hit Iran's coastal surveillance and air defense facilities a day after two U.S. troops were killed in an Iranian strike on Jordan.

zh.title: 美国表示在导致两名美国军人丧生的袭击后针对伊朗军队进行了打击
zh.summary: 美国军方对伊朗的沿海监视和防空设施进行了打击，以回应伊朗对约旦的袭击，该袭击导致两名美国军人丧生。美国中央司令部确认了对伊朗军队的报复行动。

title: Chinese firm seeks compensation over British Steel nationalisation
summary: Chinese steelmaker Jingye announced plans to pursue legal action after the UK government nationalized British Steel, signaling a potential international legal dispute. The company's move to seek compensation through courts escalates tensions over the sudden change in ownership.
content: Jingye said it will take action "through legal means to the very end" after the UK government nationalised British Steel.

zh.title: 中国公司寻求对英国钢铁国有化的赔偿
zh.summary: 中国钢铁制造商晋冶在英国政府国有化英国钢铁后宣布计划采取法律行动，预示着潜在的国际法律争端。该公司通过法院寻求赔偿的举动升级了关于所有权突然变化的紧张局势。

title: Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami, U.S. Marshals Service tells AP
summary: Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate were arrested in Miami by the U.S. Marshals Service, bringing a significant development to an international legal case that began in Romania and extended to Britain. The arrests center this high-profile dispute in the U.S. jurisdiction.
content: The arrests place the U.S. at the center of an international legal saga that has stretched from Romania to Britain.

zh.title: 社交媒体影响者安德鲁和特里斯坦·泰特在迈阿密被美国法警逮捕
zh.summary: 社交媒体影响者安德鲁和特里斯坦·泰特在美国法警局在迈阿密逮捕，这给一个始于罗马尼亚并延伸到英国的国际法律案件带来了重大进展。这次逮捕将这一高调纠纷置于美国司法管辖权之下。

title: Is Burnham promising a new dawn for North Sea oil and gas?
summary: The incoming UK Prime Minister is expected to announce fresh support for the North Sea oil and gas industry from the start of his premiership, signaling continued backing for fossil fuel development. The move represents a policy stance on energy independence and industry sustainability.
content: The incoming PM is expected to announce fresh support for the North Sea from day one of his premiership.

zh.title: 伯纳姆承诺北海石油和天然气的新曙光吗？
zh.summary: 即将上任的英国首相预计将在其任期开始时宣布对北海石油和天然气产业的新支持，表明对化石燃料开发的持续支持。这一举措代表了在能源独立和产业可持续性上的政策立场。

title: My husband and I are retired. Our financial adviser, who is in his 30s, called us ‘you guyses.’ Is that unprofessional?
summary: A retired couple questions whether their financial adviser's informal language—specifically calling them 'you guyses'—is unprofessional and whether they should request a representative closer to their generation. The inquiry highlights tensions between generational communication styles in professional advisory relationships.
content: “I’m wondering whether I should ask to work with someone closer to our generation.”

zh.title: 我和丈夫已经退休。我们的财务顾问是一个三十多岁的人，称我们为"you guyses"。这不专业吗？
zh.summary: 一对退休夫妇质疑他们的财务顾问的非正式语言——特别是称他们为"you guyses"——是否不专业，以及他们是否应该要求换一个年代更接近他们的代表。这个问题凸显了专业顾问关系中代际沟通风格之间的紧张关系。

title: New EU border system tripling time at passport control, airport boss says
summary: A new EU border system is tripling wait times at passport control, with Ryanair warning European summer travelers to prepare for extended delays. The system change is significantly impacting airport operations across the region.
content: Ryanair has also warned passengers travelling to Europe this summer to prepare for extended waits.

zh.title: 新欧盟边境系统使护照检查时间增加三倍，机场负责人表示
zh.summary: 新的欧盟边境系统导致护照检查等待时间增加三倍，瑞安航空警告欧洲夏季旅客要为延长的延误做好准备。这一系统变化对整个地区的机场运营产生了重大影响。

title: The hidden cost of the night shift and how to sleep it off
summary: More than three million UK workers do night shifts, which significantly impacts their health and wellbeing. The article explores potential solutions and support mechanisms to help night shift workers manage their health challenges.
content: More than three million people in the UK work night shifts, which can greatly impact their health. What can be done to help them?

zh.title: 夜班工作的隐性成本及其应对方法
zh.summary: 英国超过三百万工人从事夜班工作，这严重影响了他们的健康和幸福。该文章探讨了帮助夜班工人应对健康挑战的潜在解决方案和支持机制。
